시편 140:1.content: Deliver me, Yahweh, from the evil man. Preserve me from the violent man:

시편 140:2.content: those who devise mischief in their hearts. They continually gather themselves together for war.

시편 140:3.content: They have sharpened their tongues like a serpent. Viper’s poison is under their lips.

시편 140:4.content: Yahweh, keep me from the hands of the wicked. Preserve me from the violent men who have determined to trip my feet.

시편 140:5.content: The proud have hidden a snare for me, they have spread the cords of a net by the path. They have set traps for me.

시편 140:6.content: I said to Yahweh, “You are my God.” Listen to the cry of my petitions, Yahweh.

시편 140:7.content: Yahweh, the Lord, the strength of my salvation, you have covered my head in the day of battle.

시편 140:8.content: Yahweh, don’t grant the desires of the wicked. Don’t let their evil plans succeed, or they will become proud.

시편 140:9.content: As for the head of those who surround me, let the mischief of their own lips cover them.

시편 140:10.content: Let burning coals fall on them. Let them be thrown into the fire, into miry pits, from where they never rise.

시편 140:11.content: An evil speaker won’t be established in the earth. Evil will hunt the violent man to overthrow him.

시편 140:12.content: I know that Yahweh will maintain the cause of the afflicted, and justice for the needy.

시편 140:13.content: Surely the righteous will give thanks to your name. The upright will dwell in your presence.
